name: minisheet-desktop
description: An Electron desktop shell for the Minisheet spreadsheet project.
author: Minisheet Contributors

scripts.dev:app: npm run build:icons && npm run build:backend && wait-on tcp:3000 && cross-env MINISHEET_RENDERER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 electron-forge start
scripts.make:mac: cross-env MINISHEET_TARGET_PLATFORM=darwin MINISHEET_TARGET_ARCH=arm64 npm run prepare:desktop && cross-env MINISHEET_TARGET_PLATFORM=darwin MINISHEET_TARGET_ARCH=arm64 electron-forge make --platform=darwin --arch=arm64
scripts.make:win: cross-env MINISHEET_TARGET_PLATFORM=win32 MINISHEET_TARGET_ARCH=x64 npm run prepare:desktop && cross-env MINISHEET_TARGET_PLATFORM=win32 MINISHEET_TARGET_ARCH=x64 node ./scripts/run-forge-make.cjs --platform=win32 --arch=x64
